expectations.text: Report includes a site baseline section with DR and organic traffic metrics
expectations.evidence: Site Overview table: organic keywords 76, estimated traffic 1,847/mo, organic traffic value ~$16,862/mo.

expectations.text: An opportunity table is produced with at least one content recommendation
expectations.evidence: Summary Table with 10 gaps, each with keyword, volume, position, current page, SERP wants, gap type, action.

expectations.text: Each opportunity includes the gap type
expectations.evidence: Summary Table has Gap Type column. Narrative sections describe format mismatch, cannibalization, etc.

expectations.text: SERP evidence is cited for at least one opportunity
expectations.evidence: Every gap has 'What Google rewards' section with specific competitor URLs, DRs, traffic, and page type tags.

expectations.text: At least one Ahrefs tool was used to validate keyword volume and KD
expectations.evidence: KD values cited throughout (KD2, KD3, KD5, KD6). Volumes from Ahrefs Site Explorer.

expectations.text: At least one GSC tool or Ahrefs site-explorer tool was used to pull keyword data
expectations.evidence: Ahrefs site-explorer-organic-keywords used as primary data source.

expectations.text: At least one ranking page was crawled to assess intent match
expectations.evidence: GAP 7 quotes H1 verbatim: 'Construction SEO agency that drives project inquiries and clients'. Multiple page-level content assessments.

expectations.text: Branded terms are excluded from the recommendations
expectations.evidence: No Breaking B2B branded terms appear as target keywords.

expectations.text: A quick wins section is present distinguishing page updates from new-content opportunities
expectations.evidence: Tier 3 'Fix Existing' section with 4 items: retitles, cannibalization merges, page reframes.

expectations.text: Keyword volumes are labelled as Global MSV, not US-only
expectations.evidence: Volumes expressed as 'vol/mo' not 'Global MSV'. Scope note says 'US market'.
